code: import"./Recipes.css";import{useEffect,useState}from"react";import axios from"axios";import{useNavigate,Link}from"react-router-dom";import UserNavbar from"./UserNavbar";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs,Fragment as _Fragment}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function Recipes(){const[recipes,setRecipes]=useState([]);const navigate=useNavigate();useEffect(()=>{const token=localStorage.getItem("token");if(!token){alert("Please login first ❌");navigate("/login");return;}axios.get("http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/recipes/",{headers:{Authorization:`Token ${token}`}}).then(res=>{const fixedData=res.data.map(recipe=>({...recipe,image:recipe.image?`http://127.0.0.1:8000${recipe.image}`:"/default-food.jpg"}));setRecipes(fixedData);}).catch(err=>{console.error("Recipe fetch error:",err);alert("Failed to load recipes ❌");});},[navigate]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(_Fragment,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(UserNavbar,{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"recipes-page",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"All Recipes"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"recipes-grid",children:recipes.map(recipe=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"recipe-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:recipe.image,alt:recipe.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"recipe-info",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:recipe.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["\uD83D\uDC64 ",recipe.author]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["\uD83D\uDC41 ",recipe.views," views"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:`/recipedetails/${recipe.id}`,className:"view-btn",children:"View Recipe"})]})]},recipe.id))})]})]});}
